name: chart/area-chart
description: Area chart with optional stacking, multi-series support, and hover tooltip.

meta.name: AreaChart
meta.description: Area chart with optional stacking, multi-series support, and hover tooltip.

props.name: fill
props.description: Area fill style — solid, a top→bottom gradient, or a pattern.

props.name: plain
props.description: Marks only — no axes, grid lines, or legend. For micro/inline charts.

props.name: annotations
props.description: Reference lines, shaded bands, and markers drawn over the plot (e.g. a target/threshold line).

props.name: labels
props.type: boolean | { format?: (v: number) => string; position?: string }
props.description: Print each value as a label on the mark (collision-aware, decorative/aria-hidden).

props.name: onSelect
props.description: Fired when a point is clicked or activated (Enter/Space) — for drill-down.

props.name: brush
props.description: Show a keyboard-operable Brush below the plot to subset the series to a window.

props.name: dataZoom
props.description: Show a DataZoom slider below the plot — a Brush whose body also pans the window.

props.name: zoom
props.description: Enable in-plot wheel/drag/keyboard zoom-pan (+/-/0) over the series index window, with a reset control and re-ticked axes.

props.name: syncId
props.description: Connect this chart to others sharing the same id — they mirror the zoom window and hovered x.

examples.title: Basic area chart
examples.code:
import { AreaChart } from '@cascivo/charts'

const series = [{ id: 'a', label: 'Revenue', data: [{x:1,y:10},{x:2,y:20}] }]
<AreaChart series={series} x={d => d.x} y={d => d.y} title="Revenue" />

whenToUse: Showing cumulative volume or magnitude of a trend over continuous time
Emphasising the total of stacked multi-series values across a range
whenNotToUse: Reading precise individual values — use LineChart

related.name: LineChart
related.reason: Use when precise values matter more than filled volume

intent.a11yRationale: Renders with role="img" and requires a title prop for screen reader labeling.
